metadata.name: inco_token
metadata.description: Private Vault - Encrypted Vault Program for Solana using Inco Lightning

instructions.name: add_extra_condition
docs: Add an extra condition to a vault

instructions.name: add_secret_chunk
docs: Add encrypted secret chunk to a vault

instructions.name: claim_vault
docs: Claim vault assets (verify recipient + check conditions)

instructions.name: create_vault
docs: Create a vault with SOL deposit + primary condition

instructions.name: grant_decryption_rights
docs: Grant FHE decryption rights (for secret vaults after conditions met)

instructions.name: initialize_vault_counter
docs: Initialize the global vault counter (one-time admin setup)

instructions.name: mint_to_with_handle
docs: Mint tokens using a pre-existing encrypted handle

instructions.name: set_encrypted_field
docs: Add encrypted field to an existing vault (FHE)

instructions.name: transfer_checked_with_handle
docs: Transfer checked using a pre-existing encrypted handle

instructions.name: transfer_with_handle
docs: Transfer tokens using a pre-existing encrypted handle

types.name: ConditionInput
docs: Condition input for vault creation (passed as instruction arg)

types.name: CreateVaultArgs
docs: Args for create_vault instruction (flattened for tx size efficiency)
